languages.text: "Ты упрям как грокс! Я принимаю твою помощь, раз хочешь рискнуть шеей".
"You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."
languages.original_text: "Ты упрям как грокс! Я принимаю твою помощь, раз хочешь рискнуть шеей".

traits.locale_text: "You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."
"You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."
"You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."

languages.text: 「お前は頑固なグロックスだな！命を危険にさらす覚悟があるなら、助けてくれる」
languages.original_text: "You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."

traits.locale_text: 「お前は頑固なグロックスだな！命を危険にさらす覚悟があるなら、助けてくれるわ。」

languages.text: "Sende ne groks inadı varmış! Madem boynunu riske atmaya hazırsın, yardımını kabul ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."

traits.locale_text: "Sende ne groks inadı varmış! Madem boynunu riske atmaya hazırsın, yardımını kabul ediyorum."

languages.text: «¡Es más testarudo que un grox! Aceptaré su ayuda, ya que está dispuesto a jugarse el cuello».
languages.original_text: "You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."

traits.locale_text: «¡Es más testarudo que un grox! Aceptaré su ayuda, ya que está dispuesto a jugarse el cuello».

languages.text: “你倔得像一头格洛克斯兽！既然你愿意豁出命去，那你就来吧。”
languages.original_text: "You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."

traits.locale_text: “你倔得像一头格洛克斯兽！既然你愿意豁出命去，那你就来吧。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes têtu comme un grox, ma parole ! Très bien, j'accepte votre aide, puisque vous tenez tant à risquer votre vie. »
languages.original_text: "You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes têtu comme un grox, ma parole ! Très bien, j'accepte votre aide, puisque vous tenez tant à risquer votre vie. »

languages.text: "Ihr seid stur wie ein Grox! Ich nehme Eure Hilfe an, weil Ihr bereit seid, Euren Hals zu riskieren."
languages.original_text: "You're as stubborn as a grox! I'll accept your help, since you're willing to risk your neck."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid stur wie ein Grox! Ich nehme Eure Hilfe an, weil Ihr bereit seid, Euren Hals zu riskieren."
